subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-12 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of God will make such great progress in Germany as to excel every other place… When, as a child, I would hear descriptions of Ptolemy's model of the universe
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر الله در آلمان ترقی عظیم نماید و از همه
subcodes.subjects: @infinity and eternity, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @predictions and prophecies
